constitutional_summary: AFRT is the first dedicated adversarial reasoning layer in the CEL. The Red Team Agent generates 1-5 deterministic adversarial test cases per proposal, targeting uncovered code paths sourced from CodeIntelModel. A mutation that survives adversarial peer-review advances to GovernanceGateV2. The Red Team may NEVER emit an approval event (AFRT-0 — constitutional hard block). All case generation is deterministic (AFRT-DETERM-0). Ledger-first: RedTeamLedgerEvent is committed before the report is returned (AFRT-LEDGER-0).
ip_claim: World-first: constitutionally-governed adversarial peer-review as a CEL gate. Dedicated Red Team Agent performs targeted adversarial falsification of mutation proposals — probing paths the proposing agent did not exercise — before governance scoring. Mutations must survive adversarial stress-testing to advance.
